posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
App builders - this one is for you!

We just added a new tab to the developer section that allows you to directly submit your app to the marketplace. It really is as simple as 1, 2, 3!

  1. Open your app’s management page.
  2. Click Publish to generate a shareable link.
  3. Complete the app submission form.

Screen Shot 2023-04-24 at 5.37.25 PM2900×1730 372 KB
